'''Nonsu''' was a company that sold information on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]].

==History==
The company was headquartered in the [[Stratablock 7]] building located in [[Ektra]] [[City/Legends|city]]. Nonsu also was involved in the production of materials that helped expand the city of Ektra. Nonsu was unchallenged except for the rival company [[CarsinShare]] which competed for business with the Nonsu corporation. The two companies would stage [[Death/Legends|death]] matches in the underworld of Ektra, where champion [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiators]] from each company would fight to the death.<ref name="CCW" />

{{Company-stub}}
